author: vega
text:
skill: warn that bl review auto-appends task id

The Commands table row for `bl review` did not mention that the task
id is auto-appended to the squash subject — that fact lived only in
the later "Commit messages" section. Agents skimming the table mirror
the [bl-xxxx] convention they see in git log into their -m, producing
duplicated tags.

Inline the warning into the row and add a regression test on the
rendered skill output so the gap can't reopen silently.
